title: Letter

Street Address
City, Postal Code


Re: Subject of the letter

Dear [Name / Sir / Madam],

Replace this paragraph with the body of your letter. Keep paragraphs short and focused on one idea each — most readers skim, and short paragraphs make skimming productive.

A second paragraph that builds on the first. End with a clear call to action or a specific request if appropriate.

Thank you for your consideration. I look forward to your response.

Sincerely,


Your Name
